name: Men's Rubberized Plastic Wrap Sport Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses - All In Motion™ Black: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Add a sporty touch to your sunny-day looks with these black sport sunglasses with green gradient lenses. Crafted with 100% recycled plastic frames for a lightweight feel. UV-protection lenses help keep your eyes shielded from the sun. Designed to fit medium faces and feature a scratch-resistant construction that promotes lasting use.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
